changesProposed.name: AbCellera

current.name: AbCellera
current.founder: Carl Hansen, Véronique Lecault, Kevin Heyries, Daniel Da Costa, Kathleen Lisaingo, Oleh Petriv

verified.name: AbCellera Biologics Inc.
verified.description: Vancouver-based biotechnology company that discovers and develops antibody therapeutics using a proprietary microfluidic platform for single-cell analysis. The company has transitioned from a partnership-focused model to advancing its own pipeline of internal antibody drug programs across multiple therapeutic areas.
verified.notes: Company is publicly traded on Nasdaq under ticker ABCL. In 2023, made strategic decision to shift focus from partnerships to advancing internal and co-development programs. Multiple clinical programs in development as of 2025 (ABCL635, ABCL575, ABCL688).

changesProposed.name: Climeworks

verified.name: Climeworks
verified.description: Swiss company specializing in direct air capture and sequestration technology that removes CO2 directly from the ambient air through an adsorption-desorption process. The company operates commercial direct air capture facilities including large-scale plants in Iceland called Orca and Mammoth.
verified.notes: Wikipedia confirms founding in November 2009. Company operates Mammoth plant in Iceland (launched May 2024) with capacity to capture up to 36,000 tons of CO2 annually. Unicorn status achieved after April 2022 $650M funding round (per Wikipedia). Source [0] is company website with limited verifiable detail. Source [2] mentions Frontier carbon removal coalition but provides no company-specific financial data. Database entry claims Series F stage, $1B+ raised, and specific investors, but these cannot be verified from provided sources.
